query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.priority,
  p.owner,
  p.contractors,
  p.blScore,
  p.matchedBusinessLines,
  p.productLane,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.tier,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%' OR p.location LIKE '%Queensland%' OR p.location LIKE '%Northern Territory%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '"Portable Air"')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.contractors, p.blScore, p.matchedBusinessLines, p.productLane, p.lifecycleStatus, p.tier
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, p.blScore DESC
LIMIT 20;
